title: Zimvest to Reward New Users in Savings Campaign  …Excites TFAA audience with freebies, brand experience at the 16th edition
description: Digital wealth and investment management firm, Zedcrest Investment Managers (ZIMVEST) on Sunday, February 20th, 2022 announced a 7-day savings reward campaign to promote a healthy savings culture and
html:
Digital wealth and investment management firm, Zedcrest Investment Managers (ZIMVEST) on Sunday, February 20th, 2022 announced a 7-day savings reward campaign to promote a healthy savings culture and reaffirm its commitment to enriching lives at the 16th edition of The Future Awards Africa (TFAA) held in Lagos.

The campaign themed #Zimvest50kgiveaway was also initiated to celebrate African youths through the biggest youth platform on the continent.

50 new users of Zimvest App will receive up to 50,000 naira in their Wealthbox savings account on the app from February 20th – 27th. To qualify, all participants are to download the Zimvest App on the Google Play or iOS Store; follow Zimvest on Instagram and/or Twitter (@zimvestapp); sign up using the referral code – TFAA and create a WealthBox account on the app.

According to the Chief Operating Officer of Zimvest, Renah Osiemi, the campaign was initiated in continuation of Zimvest support for this year’s TFAA.

“At Zimvest, we believe everyone must develop a savings culture. This explains why we are happy to have this opportunity to enrich and empower Nigerians with cash rewards of up to 50,000 naira, especially at this time”, she said.

She stated the cash prize is non-withdrawable for one month as it is expected to help many new users of Zimvest App to start saving and set their wealth creation journey in motion.

The 16th edition of the awards themed “Celebrating Challengers and Builders”, was held at the Federal Palace Hotel, Victoria Island, Lagos. The award ceremony was hosted by Nollywood actress and show host, Nancy Isime.

Winners for this year’s award include Andrea Iyamah, Temilade ‘Tems’ Openiyi, Bimbo Ademoye, Tunde Onakoya of Chess2slums, and a host of others.

On the red carpet at the awards ceremony, Zimvest organized financial quizzes and rewarded guests with branded items.

Zimvest is a subsidiary of the new-age principal investing and financial solutions powerhouse in Africa, Zedcrest Group. The company is licensed by the Securities & Exchange Commission (SEC) as a Fund & Portfolio Manager. The company’s products are designed to offer inflation and currency protection, risk management and sustainable growth.

Other members of the Zedcrest include the leading consumer finance brand, Zedvance Finance; award-winning inter-dealer brokerage firm, Zedcap Partners and venture capital company, Zedcrest Capital.
